message:
refactor(cli,server): gut CLI lib.rs, simplify health check, and improve auth hint

- cli: Strip 33k lines of monolithic CLI implementation from lib.rs,
  reducing it to a doc-comment stub; add fastmcp workspace dependency
  to Cargo.toml in preparation for the new architecture
- server: Simplify is_agent_mail_health_check() by removing body/header
  signature parsing — now treats any 2xx/3xx status as success and
  explicitly shuts down the TCP stream before returning
- server: Clarify JWT fix hint to mention asymmetric algorithms (RS*/ES*)
  instead of generic "JWKS-backed verification"

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,6 +14,7 @@ path = "src/main.rs"
 
 [dependencies]
 clap = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
+fastmcp.workspace = true
 serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
 json5.workspace = true
